title: Afroaster lydenburgensis
taxonomy: Afroaster lydenburgensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to South Africa. The classification of Afroaster lydenburgensis is within the genus Afroaster, which belongs to the tribe Oldenburgieae. This genus is closely related to the genus Oldenburgia. More research is needed to confirm its taxonomic classification.
